recommendations.overview: A twisted honeymoon adventure about a young couple on their way to Niagara Falls.

recommendations.title: The Circus
recommendations.overview: Charlie, a wandering tramp, becomes a circus handyman - soon the star of the show - and falls in love with the circus owner's stepdaughter.

recommendations.title: The Last Client
recommendations.overview: Renowned psychologist Susanne (Signe Egholm Olsen) is caught in a living nightmare when her new client (Anton Hjejle) turns out to be a wanted serial killer.

recommendations.title: Babyteeth
recommendations.overview: A terminally ill teen upsets her parents when she falls in love with a small-time drug dealer.

recommendations.title: Shadow of a Doubt

recommendations.title: The Plagues of Breslau
recommendations.overview: Every day at 6 pm a serial killer kills another person. Police officer Helena Rus thinks the killings are done by one man only and decides to reveal the killer's identity by getting back in 18th century history of the city.

recommendations.title: Unhappily Ever After
recommendations.overview: María José and Alfredo are about to celebrate their 20th anniversary and their children give them a trip to the hotel where they celebrated their honeymoon, but a spell will make them repeat the same day.
